headline: Consulting Firms Double Down on AI Agents—But Real Value Delivery Stays Murky

stories.title: Accenture & Databricks Partner to Scale AI Agents Enterprise-Wide
stories.summary: Accenture just launched the Accenture Databricks Business Group mid-March to help enterprises move AI from lab to production. They're bundling Databricks' latest tools—Lakebase, Genie, and Agent Bricks—to solve the data fragmentation problem holding back AI at scale.
stories.takeaway: Lowkey a flex that Accenture's solving the unglamorous infrastructure problem everyone avoids talking about. This is how consulting firms actually justify their fees in 2026.

stories.title: Deloitte Scraps Traditional Job Titles as AI Reshapes the Consulting Pyramid
stories.summary: Deloitte's dropping the old consulting tier system—no more 'junior analyst' or 'senior manager.' They're rebuilding roles around actual skills needed when AI does the grunt work, moving away from the decades-old pyramid model that's literally broken now.
stories.takeaway: Tbh this is wild—basically admitting the whole entry-level consultant grind is obsolete. Other Big 4 firms are probably sweating watching this play out.

stories.title: Accenture's AI Mandate: Use Gen AI or No Promotion—Here's Why
stories.summary: Accenture literally tied promotions to AI tool adoption, forcing 11K-person workforce to embrace gen AI or stall out career-wise. It's aggressive, but signals where the market's headed—AI fluency is now table stakes, not optional.
stories.takeaway: Fr this is the consulting industry saying 'adapt or get left behind.' Risky move for retention, but clients demanding real gen AI chops made it inevitable.

watchNext.title: McKinsey Insight 2026 Program Goes In-Person in Chicago (April 30-May 2)
watchNext.why: McKinsey's first fully in-person advanced degree program in years—signals they're doubling down on talent pipelines despite AI automation. Worth watching how they position consulting careers to PhDs/MDs when AI is literally doing junior work.

watchNext.title: OpenAI & Anthropic Multi-Year Consulting Deals: The Battle for Agent Deployment
watchNext.why: OpenAI just signed with McKinsey, BCG, Accenture—Anthropic with Accenture & Deloitte. This is literally the AI model war playing out through consulting firms. Whoever controls consulting deployment wins enterprise market capture.
